purpose: Capture the research-backed starting point for a FAMtastic Studio build or iteration before generation begins.

required_fields.source_brief: Original user/client request or iteration objective.
required_fields.source_ids: Array of source identifiers or local artifacts used.
required_fields.open_questions: Questions that matter before build execution.

optional_fields.constraints: Known project, cost, brand, launch, or implementation constraints.
optional_fields.related_site: Site slug/tag if the brief applies to an existing site.
optional_fields.assumptions: Explicit assumptions made by the agent.
optional_fields.next_recommended_action: Recommended next action after brief approval/proof.

proof_validation_expectations: source_ids references exist or are marked as local artifacts.
open_questions are actionable or explicitly empty.
status is one of the allowed values.
No generation/build action starts before this object exists for serious work.
